page.title: Integrations
page.subtitle: Per-project plugins. Each project decides which integrations to enable independently.
page.selectProject: Select a project to manage integrations.
page.empty: No plugins are bundled with this hub build.

card.deactivatedHint: Installed but deactivated — Claude won't load it next session. Toggle Active to re-enable.

cachedNotice.body: Claude has the marketplace plugin installed but disabled in its cache. It may still resolve the server from ~/.claude/plugins/cache/... even though the toggle is off. To force project-scoped only, uninstall the marketplace plugin from Claude:
cachedNotice.runInstruction: Run inside an active Claude session, then restart Claude in this project.

update.body: The bundled manifest changed since you installed (likely an upstream rename). Re-write .mcp.json with the canonical entry — surgical, only the plugin's owned keys are touched.

conflict.body: {{name}} is also enabled globally via Claude's plugin marketplace, which shadows this project-scoped install. To make this card go Active, disable the global version below — it can be re-enabled from Claude any time.

uninstallDialog.title: Uninstall {{name}}?
uninstallDialog.body: This will revert plugin-managed entries in .mcp.json and remove any plugin-created files. Your code, history, and other plugins are not affected.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.dialogDescription: Browse the bundled specrails-hub documentation. Use the sidebar to switch between guides.
docs.indexEmpty: No documents available. The bundled docs ship under docs/ in the repo — drop Markdown files there or under ~/.specrails/docs/ to extend them.
docs.categoryEmpty: No documents in this category yet.
